fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date associated with this absence entry.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the absence entry.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the absence entry.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity of the absence entry, which was planned for this work center or machine center.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the absence entry, for example, holiday or vacation"

fields.name: Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calendar has been updated with this absence entry.
